SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.models

Class Message<T>

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Message<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the payload this message carries
public class Message<T> extends Object
A generic envelope for all messages transmitted over the Message Bus.

Every piece of communication between components (registration payloads, commands, events, heartbeats) is wrapped in a Message before being published to a topic. Subscribers receive Message objects and inspect the TopicType and payload to respond appropriately.

  • Constructor Details

    • Message

      public Message(TopicType topic, String senderId, T payload)
      Constructs a new Message.
      Parameters:
      topic - the topic this message is published to
      senderId - the ID of the sender (device ID or node ID)
      payload - the content of the message

  • Method Details

    • getMessageId

      public String getMessageId()
      Returns:
      unique ID of this message

    • getTopic

      public TopicType getTopic()
      Returns:
      the topic this message belongs to

    • getSenderId

      public String getSenderId()
      Returns:
      the ID of the component that sent this message

    • getPayload

      public T getPayload()
      Returns:
      the payload carried by this message

    • getMessageType

      public String getMessageType()
      Returns the fully-qualified class name of the payload. Used during deserialization to reconstruct the correct generic type.
      Returns:
      payload class name, e.g. "edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Command"

    • getTimestamp

      public long getTimestamp()
      Returns:
      the time at which this message was created
